title: Pure Storage FlashArray controller failover and nondisruptive upgrade status
dataSources: Controller HA events in `purestorage:alert` and controller role fields on `purestorage:array`
app: Pure Storage Unified Add-on for Splunk (5513)
spl:
index=storage sourcetype="purestorage:alert"
| search controller OR failover OR "nondisruptive" OR NDU OR upgrade
| eval arr=coalesce(array_name, array)
| stats count as evts latest(_time) as last_seen by arr, message
| sort - evts
description: Unexpected controller failovers during upgrades or steady state point to power, firmware, or path issues. Correlating NDU windows prevents false escalations.
value: Keeps maintenance slots trustworthy and reduces Sev1 noise during controller replacements.
implementation: Tag change windows via lookup on `array_name` and suppress benign NDU messages. Retain raw events in a long-retention index for vendor cases.

references.title: Pure Storage Unified Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase)
